redactions.label: Langfriststrategie 2050
removed_passages: National long-term strategies EU Member States have developed national long-term strategies on how they plan to achieve the greenhouse gas emissions reductions needed to meet their commitments under the Paris Agreement and EU's climate neutrality objective.
The long-term strategies should be consistent with Member States’ integrated National Energy and Climate Plans (NECPs) for the period 2021-30.
The governance regulation required Member States to submit their first national long-term strategies to the Commission by 1 January 2020.

redactions.label: Current Population Survey
removed_passages: Labor Force Statistics from the Current Population Survey SHARE ON: The Current Population Survey (CPS) provides a wealth of information on the nation’s labor force including data on the employed, unemployed, and those not in the labor force.
See the CPS release calendar for a schedule of news releases on other topics.

redactions.label: Flüchtlingsstatistik
removed_passages: 117.3 MILLION Forcibly displaced people worldwide Forcibly displaced people worldwide at mid-2025 as a result of persecution, conflict, violence, human rights violations or events seriously disturbing public order.
